questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司推出了 Amazon RDS for MySQL 数据库实例。大多数数据库连接来自无服务器应用程序。数据库的应用程序流量以随机间隔显着变化。在需求量很大时，用户报告他们的应用程序遇到数据库连接拒绝错误。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销解决此问题？
question_text.en: A company has launched an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance. Most of the connections to the database come from serverless applications. Application traffic to the database changes significantly at random intervals. At times of high demand, users report that their applications experience database connection rejection errors. Which solution will resolve this issue with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 在 RDS Proxy 中创建代理。配置用户的应用程序以通过 RDS Proxy 使用数据库实例。
A.en: Create a proxy in RDS Proxy. Configure the users’ applications to use the DB instance through RDS Proxy.

B.zh: 在用户应用程序和数据库实例之间部署 Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached。
B.en: Deploy Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached between the users’ applications and the DB instance.

C.zh: 将数据库实例迁移到具有更高 I/O 容量的其他实例类。配置用户的应用程序以使用新的数据库实例。
C.en: Migrate the DB instance to a different instance class that has higher I/O capacity. Configure the users’ applications to use the new DB instance.

D.zh: 为数据库实例配置多可用区。配置用户的应用程序以在数据库实例之间切换。
D.en: Configure Multi-AZ for the DB instance. Configure the users’ applications to switch between the DB instances.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：RDS Proxy 可以管理数据库连接池，减少连接开销并提高应用程序可扩展性。特别适合处理动态流量变化和高并发场景，同时运行开销较低。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: RDS Proxy can manage database connection pools, reducing connection overhead and improving application scalability. It is particularly suitable for handling dynamic traffic changes and high concurrency scenarios, while having low operational overhead.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：ElastiCache主要用于缓存数据，以减少数据库查询次数。不过问题并没有提到查询性能问题，而是提到数据库连接被拒绝的问题。此选项不直接解决连接管理问题。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: ElastiCache is mainly used to cache data to reduce the number of database queries. However, the question does not mention the query performance problem, but the problem of database connection being refused. This option does not directly address connection management issues.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：升级实例类型可以提高性能，但不能解决连接管理问题。在高并发场景下，连接数的限制仍然存在，操作开销较高。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Upgrading the instance type improves performance but does not resolve connection management issues. In high concurrency scenarios, the limit on the number of connections still exists, and the operation overhead is high.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Multi-AZ主要用于提高数据库的高可用和容灾能力，而不是优化连接管理。此选项不能解决连接被拒绝的问题。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Multi-AZ is mainly used to improve the high availability and disaster recovery capabilities of the database, rather than optimizing connection management. This option does not resolve connection refused issues.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 RDS Proxy 中创建代理。配置用户的应用程序以通过 RDS Proxy 使用数据库实例。
answer_text.en: A. Create a proxy in RDS Proxy. Configure the users’ applications to use the DB instance through RDS Proxy.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：RDS Proxy 可以管理数据库连接池，减少连接开销并提高应用程序可扩展性。特别适合处理动态流量变化和高并发场景，同时运行开销较低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: RDS Proxy can manage database connection pools, reducing connection overhead and improving application scalability. It is particularly suitable for handling dynamic traffic changes and high concurrency scenarios, while having low operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司最近部署了一个新的审核系统，以集中有关 Amazon EC2 实例的操作系统版本、修补和安装软件的信息。解决方案架构师必须确保通过 EC2 Auto Scaling 组配置的所有实例在启动和终止后立即成功将报告发送到审核系统。哪种解决方案最有效地实现这些目标？
question_text.en: A company recently deployed a new auditing system to centralize information about operating system versions, patching, and installed software for Amazon EC2 instances. A solutions architect must ensure all instances provisioned through EC2 Auto Scaling groups successfully send reports to the auditing system as soon as they are launched and terminated. Which solution achieves these goals MOST efficiently?

A.zh: 使用计划的 AWS Lambda 函数并在所有 EC2 实例上远程运行脚本以将数据发送到审核系统。
A.en: Use a scheduled AWS Lambda function and run a script remotely on all EC2 instances to send data to the audit system.

B.zh: 使用 EC2 Auto Scaling 生命周期挂钩运行自定义脚本，以便在实例启动和终止时将数据发送到审核系统。
B.en: Use EC2 Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to run a custom script to send data to the audit system when instances are launched and terminated.

C.zh: 使用 EC2 Auto Scaling 启动配置通过用户数据运行自定义脚本，以便在启动和终止实例时将数据发送到审核系统。
C.en: Use an EC2 Auto Scaling launch configuration to run a custom script through user data to send data to the audit system when instances are launched and terminated.

D.zh: 在实例操作系统上运行自定义脚本，将数据发送到审计系统。配置实例启动和终止时 EC2 Auto Scaling 组要调用的脚本。
D.en: Run a custom script on the instance operating system to send data to the audit system. Configure the script to be invoked by the EC2 Auto Scaling group when the instance starts and is terminated.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 Lambda 函数可以定期运行脚本，但它无法确保在实例启动和停止时立即发送数据。这种方法效率低下，不能满足题目的实时性要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While a Lambda function can run a script periodically, it cannot ensure that data is sent immediately when the instance starts and stops. This method is inefficient and cannot meet the real-time requirements of the question.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：生命周期挂钩允许在启动和停止实例时执行自定义操作。这是实现数据实时传输的最佳方式，满足问题的要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Lifecycle hooks allow custom actions to be performed when an instance is started and stopped. This is the best way to achieve real-time data transmission and meets the requirements of the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：用户数据只在实例启动时运行，实例停止时无法进行操作，无法满足问题需求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: User data only runs when the instance is started and cannot perform operations when the instance is stopped, so it cannot meet the problem requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：EC2 Auto Scaling 组本身无法直接调用实例操作的脚本。这需要借助生命周期钩子或其他机制来实现。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The EC2 Auto Scaling group itself cannot directly invoke scripts on instance operations. This needs to be achieved with the help of life cycle hooks or other mechanisms.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 EC2 Auto Scaling 生命周期挂钩运行自定义脚本，以便在实例启动和终止时将数据发送到审核系统。
answer_text.en: B. Use EC2 Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to run a custom script to send data to the audit system when instances are launched and terminated.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：生命周期挂钩允许在启动和停止实例时执行自定义操作。这是实现数据实时传输的最佳方式，满足问题的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Lifecycle hooks allow custom actions to be performed when an instance is started and stopped. This is the best way to achieve real-time data transmission and meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在开发一款实时多人游戏，该游戏使用 UDP 在 Auto Scaling 组中的客户端和服务器之间进行通信。预计白天的需求会激增，因此游戏服务器平台必须做出相应调整。开发人员希望将玩家分数和其他非关系数据存储在无需干预即可扩展的数据库解决方案中。解决方案架构师应该推荐哪种解决方案？
question_text.en: A company is developing a real-time multiplayer game that uses UDP for communications between the client and servers in an Auto Scaling group. Spikes in demand are anticipated during the day, so the game server platform must adapt accordingly. Developers want to store gamer scores and other non-relational data in a database solution that will scale without intervention. Which solution should a solutions architect recommend?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon Route 53 进行流量分配，使用 Amazon Aurora Serverless 进行数据存储。
A.en: Use Amazon Route 53 for traffic distribution and Amazon Aurora Serverless for data storage.

B.zh: 使用网络负载均衡器进行流量分配，并使用 Amazon DynamoDB 按需进行数据存储。
B.en: Use a Network Load Balancer for traffic distribution and Amazon DynamoDB on-demand for data storage.

C.zh: 使用网络负载均衡器进行流量分配，使用 Amazon Aurora 全球数据库进行数据存储。
C.en: Use a Network Load Balancer for traffic distribution and Amazon Aurora Global Database for data storage.

D.zh: 使用应用程序负载均衡器进行流量分配，使用 Amazon DynamoDB 全局表进行数据存储。
D.en: Use an Application Load Balancer for traffic distribution and Amazon DynamoDB global tables for data storage.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Route 53 是一项 DNS 服务，而不是负载均衡器，并且直接处理 UDP 流量，无条带。 Aurora Serverless 虽然可以自动扩展，但它是关系型数据库，不适合存储非关系型数据（例如游戏比分）。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Route 53 is a DNS service, not a load balancer, and handles UDP traffic directly without stripes. Although Aurora Serverless can automatically expand, it is a relational database and is not suitable for storing non-relational data (such as game scores).

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：网络负载均衡器支持UDP协议，非常适合实时通信需求。 Amazon DynamoDB 是一个非关系型数据库，支持按需扩展，适合存储分数等非关系型数据。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Network Load Balancer supports UDP protocol, which is very suitable for real-time communication needs. Amazon DynamoDB is a non-relational database that supports on-demand expansion and is suitable for storing scores and other non-relational data.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 Network Load Balancer 支持 UDP 协议，但 Amazon Aurora Global Database 是关系数据库，不适合存储非关系数据（例如游戏分数）。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although Network Load Balancer supports UDP protocol, Amazon Aurora Global Database is a relational database and is not suitable for storing non-relational data (such as game scores).

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Application Load Balancer不支持UDP协议，仅支持HTTP/HTTPS协议，因此不适合实时应用程序的通信需求。虽然DynamoDB全局表适合存储非关系型数据，但负载均衡器的选择不正确。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Application Load Balancer does not support the UDP protocol and only supports the HTTP/HTTPS protocol, so it is not suitable for the communication needs of real-time applications. Although DynamoDB global tables are suitable for storing non-relational data, the choice of load balancer is incorrect.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用网络负载均衡器进行流量分配，并使用 Amazon DynamoDB 按需进行数据存储。
answer_text.en: B. Use a Network Load Balancer for traffic distribution and Amazon DynamoDB on-demand for data storage.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：网络负载均衡器支持UDP协议，非常适合实时通信需求。 Amazon DynamoDB 是一个非关系型数据库，支持按需扩展，适合存储分数等非关系型数据。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Network Load Balancer supports UDP protocol, which is very suitable for real-time communication needs. Amazon DynamoDB is a non-relational database that supports on-demand expansion and is suitable for storing scores and other non-relational data.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司托管一个使用与 AWS Lambda 集成的 Amazon API Gateway API 后端的前端应用程序。当 API 收到请求时，Lambda 函数会加载许多库。然后，Lambda 函数连接到 Amazon RDS 数据库，处理数据，并将数据返回到前端应用程序。该公司希望确保所有用户的响应延迟尽可能低，同时对公司运营的更改最少。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts a frontend application that uses an Amazon API Gateway API backend that is integrated with AWS Lambda. When the API receives requests, the Lambda function loads many libraries. Then the Lambda function connects to an Amazon RDS database, processes the data, and returns the data to the frontend application. The company wants to ensure that response latency is as low as possible for all its users with the fewest number of changes to the company's operations. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在前端应用程序和数据库之间建立连接，以绕过 API 来加快查询速度。
A.en: Establish a connection between the frontend application and the database to make queries faster by bypassing the API.

B.zh: 为处理请求的 Lambda 函数配置预置并发。
B.en: Configure provisioned concurrency for the Lambda function that handles the requests.

C.zh: 在 Amazon S3 中缓存查询结果，以便更快地检索类似数据集。
C.en: Cache the results of the queries in Amazon S3 for faster retrieval of similar datasets.

D.zh: 增加数据库的大小以增加 Lambda 一次可以建立的连接数。
D.en: Increase the size of the database to increase the number of connections Lambda can establish at one time.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：直接连接前端应用程序和数据库会绕过API Gateway和Lambda的逻辑处理层，破坏现有的架构设计，并可能导致安全问题和复杂性增加。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Directly connecting front-end applications and databases will bypass the logical processing layer of API Gateway and Lambda, disrupt the existing architecture design, and may lead to security issues and increased complexity.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：预置并发可以减少 Lambda 函数的冷启动时间，从而减少响应延迟。这是对现有架构进行最小改动的情况下解决问题的最佳方式。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Provisioned concurrency can reduce the cold start time of Lambda functions, thereby reducing response latency. This is the best way to solve the problem with minimal changes to the existing architecture.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然缓存可以提高性能，但是问题没有提到查询结果是重复的或者可以缓存。此外，使用 S3 作为缓存需要额外的开发工作和对现有架构的更改。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although caching can improve performance, the question does not mention that query results are duplicated or can be cached. Additionally, using S3 as a cache requires additional development work and changes to the existing architecture.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：增加数据库大小并不会直接减少Lambda函数的冷启动时间，也不会显着减少响应延迟。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Increasing the database size does not directly reduce the cold start time of the Lambda function, nor does it significantly reduce response latency.

answer_text.zh: B. 为处理请求的 Lambda 函数配置预置并发。
answer_text.en: B. Configure provisioned concurrency for the Lambda function that handles the requests.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：预置并发可以减少 Lambda 函数的冷启动时间，从而减少响应延迟。这是对现有架构进行最小改动的情况下解决问题的最佳方式。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Provisioned concurrency can reduce the cold start time of Lambda functions, thereby reducing response latency. This is the best way to solve the problem with minimal changes to the existing architecture.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在将其本地工作负载迁移到 AWS 云。该公司已使用多个 Amazon EC2 实例和 Amazon RDS 数据库实例。该公司需要一个能够在工作时间之外自动启动和停止 EC2 实例和数据库实例的解决方案。该解决方案必须最大限度地减少成本和基础设施维护。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is migrating its on-premises workload to the AWS Cloud. The company already uses several Amazon EC2 instances and Amazon RDS DB instances. The company wants a solution that automatically starts and stops the EC2 instances and DB instances outside of business hours. The solution must minimize cost and infrastructure maintenance. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用弹性调整大小来扩展 EC2 实例。在工作时间之外将数据库实例扩展到零。
A.en: Scale the EC2 instances by using elastic resize. Scale the DB instances to zero outside of business hours.

B.zh: 探索 AWS Marketplace，寻找能够按计划自动启动和停止 EC2 实例和数据库实例的合作伙伴解决方案。
B.en: Explore AWS Marketplace for partner solutions that will automatically start and stop the EC2 instances and DB instances on a schedule.

C.zh: 启动另一个 EC2 实例。配置 crontab 计划来运行 shell 脚本，这些脚本将按计划启动和停止现有 EC2 实例和数据库实例。
C.en: Launch another EC2 instance. Configure a crontab schedule to run shell scripts that will start and stop the existing EC2 instances and DB instances on a schedule.

D.zh: 创建一个将启动和停止 EC2 实例和数据库实例的 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Amazon EventBridge 以按计划调用 Lambda 函数。
D.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that will start and stop the EC2 instances and DB instances. Configure Amazon EventBridge to invoke the Lambda function on a schedule.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：EC2实例不支持“弹性调整”功能，直接缩放至零，无条带。 RDS实例也可以直接无条带扩容到零，只有Aurora Serverless支持暂停功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: EC2 instances do not support the "elastic adjustment" function and scale directly to zero without stripes. RDS instances can also be directly scaled to zero without stripes, and only Aurora Serverless supports the pause function.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然AWS Marketplace可能有相关的解决方案，但这会增加额外的成本和复杂性，不符合“最小化成本和基础设施维护”的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although the AWS Marketplace may have relevant solutions, this will add additional cost and complexity and does not meet the requirement of "minimizing cost and infrastructure maintenance".

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用额外的EC2实例来运行crontab脚本会增加基础设施维护成本，不符合“最小化成本和基础设施维护”的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using additional EC2 instances to run crontab scripts will increase infrastructure maintenance costs and does not meet the requirement of "minimizing costs and infrastructure maintenance".

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Lambda 是无服务器、低成本且免维护的。 EventBridge可以按照计划触发Lambda函数，完美满足题目要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Lambda is serverless, low cost, and maintenance-free. EventBridge can trigger Lambda functions according to plans, perfectly meeting the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: D. 创建一个将启动和停止 EC2 实例和数据库实例的 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Amazon EventBridge 以按计划调用 Lambda 函数。
answer_text.en: D. Create an AWS Lambda function that will start and stop the EC2 instances and DB instances. Configure Amazon EventBridge to invoke the Lambda function on a schedule.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Lambda 是无服务器、低成本且免维护的。 EventBridge可以按照计划触发Lambda函数，完美满足题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Lambda is serverless, low cost, and maintenance-free. EventBridge can trigger Lambda functions according to plans, perfectly meeting the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司托管一个包含 PostgreSQL 数据库的三层 Web 应用程序。数据库存储文档的元数据。该公司在元数据中搜索关键术语，以检索该公司每月在报告中审查的文档。这些文档存储在 Amazon S3 中。这些文档通常只编写一次，但会经常更新。使用关系查询，报告过程需要几个小时。报告过程不得阻止任何文件修改或添加新文件。解决方案架构师需要实施解决方案来加快报告流程。哪种解决方案能够以最少的应用程序代码更改来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts a three-tier web application that includes a PostgreSQL database. The database stores the metadata from documents. The company searches the metadata for key terms to retrieve documents that the company reviews in a report each month. The documents are stored in Amazon S3. The documents are usually written only once, but they are updated frequently. The reporting process takes a few hours with the use of relational queries. The reporting process must not prevent any document modifications or the addition of new documents. A solutions architect needs to implement a solution to speed up the reporting process. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of change to the application code?

A.zh: 设置包含只读副本的新 Amazon DocumentDB（与 MongoDB 兼容）集群。缩放只读副本以生成报告。
A.en: Set up a new Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility) cluster that includes a read replica. Scale the read replica to generate the reports.

B.zh: 设置包含 Aurora 副本的新 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 数据库集群。向 Aurora 副本发出查询以生成报告。
B.en: Set up a new Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster that includes an Aurora Replica. Issue queries to the Aurora Replica to generate the reports.

C.zh: 设置新的 Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL 多可用区数据库实例。配置上报模块查询辅助RDS节点，使上报模块不会影响主节点。
C.en: Set up a new Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL Multi-AZ DB instance. Configure the reporting module to query the secondary RDS node so that the reporting module does not affect the primary node.

D.zh: 设置新的 Amazon DynamoDB 表来存储文档。使用固定的写入容量来支持新的文档条目。自动扩展读取容量以支持报告。
D.en: Set up a new Amazon DynamoDB table to store the documents. Use a fixed write capacity to support new document entries. Automatically scale the read capacity to support the reports.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DocumentDB 是 NoSQL 数据库，与 PostgreSQL 不兼容。迁移到 DocumentDB 需要对应用程序代码进行大量更改。错误：该问题至少需要进行最少的代码更改，并且迁移到 DocumentDB 将涉及数据模型和查询语言的更改。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon DocumentDB is a NoSQL database and is not compatible with PostgreSQL. Migrating to DocumentDB requires extensive changes to the application code. Error: The question requires at least a minimum code change, and migrating to DocumentDB will involve changes to the data model and query language.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 支持读写分离，Aurora Replica 可用于处理只读查询（例如报告生成），以减少主数据库的负载。正确：Aurora PostgreSQL 与现有 PostgreSQL 数据库兼容，从而降低迁移成本并减少代码更改。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL supports read-write separation, and Aurora Replica can be used to process read-only queries (such as report generation) to reduce the load on the main database. Correct: Aurora PostgreSQL is compatible with existing PostgreSQL databases, resulting in low migration costs and minimal code changes.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：RDS Multi-AZ的辅助节点是热备节点，仅用于故障转移，不能连接查询。错误：此选项不足以生成报告，因为辅助节点无法处理读取请求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The auxiliary node of RDS Multi-AZ is a hot standby node, which is only used for failover and cannot be connected for query. Error: This option is not sufficient for report generation because the secondary node cannot handle read requests.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：DynamoDB 是 NoSQL 数据库，与 PostgreSQL 不兼容。迁移到 DynamoDB 需要对应用程序代码进行大量更改。错误：该问题至少需要进行最少的代码更改，并且迁移到 DynamoDB 将涉及数据模型和查询语言的更改。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: DynamoDB is a NoSQL database and is not compatible with PostgreSQL. Migrating to DynamoDB requires extensive changes to the application code. Error: The question requires at least a minimum code change, and migrating to DynamoDB will involve changes to the data model and query language.

answer_text.zh: B. 设置包含 Aurora 副本的新 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 数据库集群。向 Aurora 副本发出查询以生成报告。
answer_text.en: B. Set up a new Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster that includes an Aurora Replica. Issue queries to the Aurora Replica to generate the reports.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (96%) 2%。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 支持读写分离，Aurora Replica 可用于处理只读查询（例如报告生成），以减少主数据库的负载。正确：Aurora PostgreSQL 与现有 PostgreSQL 数据库兼容，从而降低迁移成本并减少代码更改。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (96%) 2%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL supports read-write separation, and Aurora Replica can be used to process read-only queries (such as report generation) to reduce the load on the main database. Correct: Aurora PostgreSQL is compatible with existing PostgreSQL databases, resulting in low migration costs and minimal code changes.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上有一个三层应用程序，可以从用户的设备中获取传感器数据。流量流经网络负载均衡器 (NLB)，然后流向 Web 层的 Amazon EC2 实例，最后流向应用程序层的 EC2 实例。应用程序层调用数据库。解决方案架构师应该如何提高传输中数据的安全性？
question_text.en: A company has a three-tier application on AWS that ingests sensor data from its users’ devices. The traffic flows through a Network Load Balancer (NLB), then to Amazon EC2 instances for the web tier, and finally to EC2 instances for the application tier. The application tier makes calls to a database. What should a solutions architect do to improve the security of the data in transit?

A.zh: 配置 TLS 侦听器。在 NLB 上部署服务器证书。
A.en: Configure a TLS listener. Deploy the server certificate on the NLB.

B.zh: 配置 AWS Shield Advanced。在 NLB 上启用 AWS WAF。
B.en: Configure AWS Shield Advanced. Enable AWS WAF on the NLB.

C.zh: 将负载均衡器更改为应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB)。在 ALB 上启用 AWS WAF。
C.en: Change the load balancer to an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Enable AWS WAF on the ALB.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 加密 EC2 实例上的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 卷。
D.en: Encrypt the Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume on the EC2 instances by using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS).

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：TLS（传输层安全）是一种在传输过程中对数据进行加密的安全标准。 Dapi在NLB上配置TLS监听，并部署服务器证书，保证数据在传输过程中加密，从而提高安全性。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: TLS (Transport Layer Security) is a security standard for encrypting data during transmission. Dapi configures a TLS listener on NLB and deploys a server certificate to ensure that data is encrypted during transmission, thereby improving security.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Shield Advanced和AWS WAF主要用于防范DDoS攻击和应用层安全问题，而不是直接用于加密数据传输。该选项与数据传输安全无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Shield Advanced and AWS WAF are mainly used to protect against DDoS attacks and application layer security issues, rather than directly for encrypted data transmission. This option has nothing to do with data transmission security.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：尽管 ALB 支持 TLS 终止，但该问题不需要更改负载均衡器。另外，启用AWS WAF主要是为了防止应用层攻击，与数据传输加密无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although ALB supports TLS termination, the question does not require changing the load balancer. In addition, enabling AWS WAF is mainly to prevent application layer attacks and has nothing to do with data transmission encryption.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：EBS加密用于保护存储数据的安全，而不是传输数据的安全。该选项与问题所要求的“传输过程中数据的安全性”无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: EBS encryption is used to protect the security of stored data, not the security of transmitted data. This option has nothing to do with the "security of data during transmission" required by the question.

answer_text.zh: A. 配置 TLS 侦听器。在 NLB 上部署服务器证书。
answer_text.en: A. Configure a TLS listener. Deploy the server certificate on the NLB.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：TLS（传输层安全）是一种在传输过程中对数据进行加密的安全标准。 Dapi在NLB上配置TLS监听，并部署服务器证书，保证数据在传输过程中加密，从而提高安全性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: TLS (Transport Layer Security) is a security standard for encrypting data during transmission. Dapi configures a TLS listener on NLB and deploys a server certificate to ensure that data is encrypted during transmission, thereby improving security.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正计划将商业现成应用程序从其本地数据中心迁移到 AWS。该软件具有使用套接字和内核的软件许可模型，具有可预测的容量和正常运行时间要求。该公司希望使用今年早些时候购买的现有许可证。哪种 Amazon EC2 定价选项最具成本效益？
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate a commercial off-the-shelf application from its on-premises data center to AWS. The software has a software licensing model using sockets and cores with predictable capacity and uptime requirements. The company wants to use its existing licenses, which were purchased earlier this year. Which Amazon EC2 pricing option is the MOST cost-effective?

A.zh: 专用保留主机
A.en: Dedicated Reserved Hosts

B.zh: 专用点播主机
B.en: Dedicated On-Demand Hosts

C.zh: 专用预留实例
C.en: Dedicated Reserved Instances

D.zh: 专用按需实例
D.en: Dedicated On-Demand Instances

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确的。专用预留主机允许用户在专用主机上运行 EC2 实例，同时使用现有的基于套接字和核心的软件许可证。此选项提供了成本效益，因为它结合了专用主机的灵活性和预留实例的折扣。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. Dedicated Reserved Hosts allow users to run EC2 instances on dedicated hosts while using existing socket- and core-based software licenses. This option provides cost-effectiveness because it combines the flexibility of dedicated hosts with the discount of Reserved Instances.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。虽然专用点播主机也支持使用现有的软件许可证，但它是按需付费的，成本更高，而且不如保留选项划算。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. Although Dedicated On-Demand Hosts also supports the use of existing software licenses, it is pay-as-you-go, which is more expensive and not as cost-effective as the reserved option.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。专用预留实例虽然提供预留折扣，但不支持基于套接字和基于核心的软件许可模型。此选项适用于实例级许可，不适用于主机级许可。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. Dedicated Reserved Instances, while offering reservation discounts, do not support socket- and core-based software licensing models. This option applies to instance-level licensing, not host-level licensing.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。专用按需实例是按需付费的，成本较高，并且不支持基于套接字和基于核心的软件许可模型。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. Dedicated On-Demand Instances are pay-as-you-go, cost more, and do not support socket- and core-based software licensing models.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (92%) 8%。热门讨论与考点摘要：正确的。专用预留主机允许用户在专用主机上运行 EC2 实例，同时使用现有的基于套接字和核心的软件许可证。此选项提供了成本效益，因为它结合了专用主机的灵活性和预留实例的折扣。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (92%) 8%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Correct. Dedicated Reserved Hosts allow users to run EC2 instances on dedicated hosts while using existing socket- and core-based software licenses. This option provides cost-effectiveness because it combines the flexibility of dedicated hosts with the discount of Reserved Instances.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在多个可用区的 Amazon EC2 Linux 实例上运行应用程序。应用程序需要一个高度可用且兼容可移植操作系统接口 (POSIX) 的存储层。存储层必须提供最大的数据持久性，并且必须可在 EC2 实例之间共享。存储层的数据在前30天会被频繁访问，之后将不再被频繁访问。哪种解决方案能够最具成本效益地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs an application on Amazon EC2 Linux instances across multiple Availability Zones. The application needs a storage layer that is highly available and Portable Operating System Interface (POSIX)-compliant. The storage layer must provide maximum data durability and must be shareable across the EC2 instances. The data in the storage layer will be accessed frequently for the first 30 days and will be accessed infrequently after that time. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 标准存储类。创建 S3 生命周期策略以将不经常访问的数据移至 S3 Glacier。
A.en: Use the Amazon S3 Standard storage class. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move infrequently accessed data to S3 Glacier.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 标准存储类。创建 S3 生命周期策略以将不经常访问的数据移至 S3 标准-不频繁访问（S3 标准-IA）。
B.en: Use the Amazon S3 Standard storage class. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move infrequently accessed data to S3 Standard- Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA).

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 标准存储类。创建生命周期管理策略，将不经常访问的数据移至 EFS 标准-不频繁访问 (EFS 标准-IA)。
C.en: Use the Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) Standard storage class. Create a lifecycle management policy to move infrequently accessed data to EFS Standard-Infrequent Access (EFS Standard-IA).

D.zh: 使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 单区存储类。创建生命周期管理策略，将不经常访问的数据移至 EFS One Zone-Infrequent Access (EFS One Zone-IA)。
D.en: Use the Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) One Zone storage class. Create a lifecycle management policy to move infrequently accessed data to EFS One Zone-Infrequent Access (EFS One Zone-IA).

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：不满足 POSIX 兼容性和共享文件要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Does not meet POSIX compatibility and shared file requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：不满足 POSIX 兼容性和共享文件要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Does not meet POSIX compatibility and shared file requirements.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：该解决方案能够满足问题中的关键功能和非功能需求，并符合相关AWS服务的设计目的和最佳实践。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The solution can meet the key functional and non-functional requirements in the question and conform to the design purposes and best practices of the relevant AWS services.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案无法同时满足问题中的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或运维约束，因此不是最佳选择。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution cannot simultaneously meet the key performance, availability, security, cost or operation and maintenance constraints in the question, so it is not the best choice.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 标准存储类。创建生命周期管理策略，将不经常访问的数据移至 EFS 标准-不频繁访问 (EFS 标准-IA)。
answer_text.en: C. Use the Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) Standard storage class. Create a lifecycle management policy to move infrequently accessed data to EFS Standard-Infrequent Access (EFS Standard-IA).

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (96%) 4%。热门讨论与考点摘要：该解决方案能够满足问题中的关键功能和非功能需求，并符合相关AWS服务的设计目的和最佳实践。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (96%) 4%. Popular discussion and key point summary: The solution can meet the key functional and non-functional requirements in the question and conform to the design purposes and best practices of the relevant AWS services.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解决方案架构师正在创建新的 VPC 设计。有两个用于负载均衡器的公有子网、两个用于 Web 服务器的私有子网和两个用于 MySQL 的私有子网。 Web 服务器仅使用 HTTPS。解决方案架构师已经为负载均衡器创建了一个安全组，允许来自 0.0.0.0/0 的端口 443。公司政策要求每个资源具有仍能够执行其任务所需的最少访问权限。解决方案架构师应该使用哪种附加配置策略来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A solutions architect is creating a new VPC design. There are two public subnets for the load balancer, two private subnets for web servers, and two private subnets for MySQL. The web servers use only HTTPS. The solutions architect has already created a security group for the load balancer allowing port 443 from 0.0.0.0/0. Company policy requires that each resource has the least access required to still be able to perform its tasks. Which additional configuration strategy should the solutions architect use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 为 Web 服务器创建安全组并允许来自 0.0.0.0/0 的端口 443。为 MySQL 服务器创建安全组，并允许 Web 服务器安全组的端口 3306。
A.en: Create a security group for the web servers and allow port 443 from 0.0.0.0/0. Create a security group for the MySQL servers and allow port 3306 from the web servers security group.

B.zh: 为 Web 服务器创建网络 ACL 并允许来自 0.0.0.0/0 的端口 443。为 MySQL 服务器创建网络 ACL，并允许来自 Web 服务器安全组的端口 3306。
B.en: Create a network ACL for the web servers and allow port 443 from 0.0.0.0/0. Create a network ACL for the MySQL servers and allow port 3306 from the web servers security group.

C.zh: 为 Web 服务器创建安全组并允许来自负载均衡器的端口 443。为 MySQL 服务器创建安全组，并允许 Web 服务器安全组的端口 3306。
C.en: Create a security group for the web servers and allow port 443 from the load balancer. Create a security group for the MySQL servers and allow port 3306 from the web servers security group.

D.zh: 为 Web 服务器创建网络 ACL 并允许来自负载均衡器的端口 443。为 MySQL 服务器创建网络 ACL，并允许来自 Web 服务器安全组的端口 3306。
D.en: Create a network ACL for the web servers and allow port 443 from the load balancer. Create a network ACL for the MySQL servers and allow port 3306 from the web servers security group.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：允许从 0.0.0.0/0 访问端口 443 违反了最小权限原则，因为 Web 服务器只需要接收来自负载均衡器的流量，而不是所有来源的流量。正确：为 MySQL 服务器创建安全组并允许 Web 服务器安全组的端口 3306 是正确的配置。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Allowing port 443 access from 0.0.0.0/0 violates the principle of least privilege because the web server only needs to receive traffic from the load balancer, not all sources. Correct: Creating a security group for the MySQL server and allowing port 3306 from the web server security group is the correct configuration.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：网络ACL是无状态的，无法根据安全组等资源之间的关系提供细粒度的控制。这个问题需要基于最小权限原则，安全组比较适合。错误：允许从 0.0.0.0/0 访问端口 443 违反了最小权限原则。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Network ACLs are stateless and cannot provide fine-grained control based on the relationship between resources like security groups. This question requires based on the principle of least privilege, and security groups are more suitable. Error: Allowing port 443 access from 0.0.0.0/0 violates the principle of least privilege.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：为Web服务器创建安全组并允许负载均衡器访问443端口符合最小权限原则，因为Web服务器只需要接收来自负载均衡器的流量。正确：为 MySQL 服务器创建安全组并允许 Web 服务器安全组的端口 3306 是正确的配置。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Creating a security group for the web server and allowing port 443 access from the load balancer complies with the principle of least privilege because the web server only needs to receive traffic from the load balancer. Correct: Creating a security group for the MySQL server and allowing port 3306 from the web server security group is the correct configuration.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：网络ACL是无状态的，无法根据安全组等资源之间的关系提供细粒度的控制。错误：虽然允许从负载均衡器访问端口 443 是正确的，但使用网络 ACL 不符合问题所需的最小权限原则。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Network ACLs are stateless and cannot provide fine-grained control based on the relationship between resources like security groups. Error: Although it is correct to allow port 443 access from the load balancer, using a network ACL does not comply with the principle of least privilege required by the question.

answer_text.zh: C. 为 Web 服务器创建安全组并允许来自负载均衡器的端口 443。为 MySQL 服务器创建安全组，并允许 Web 服务器安全组的端口 3306。
answer_text.en: C. Create a security group for the web servers and allow port 443 from the load balancer. Create a security group for the MySQL servers and allow port 3306 from the web servers security group.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：为Web服务器创建安全组并允许负载均衡器访问443端口符合最小权限原则，因为Web服务器只需要接收来自负载均衡器的流量。正确：为 MySQL 服务器创建安全组并允许 Web 服务器安全组的端口 3306 是正确的配置。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Creating a security group for the web server and allowing port 443 access from the load balancer complies with the principle of least privilege because the web server only needs to receive traffic from the load balancer. Correct: Creating a security group for the MySQL server and allowing port 3306 from the web server security group is the correct configuration.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家电子商务公司正在 AWS 上运行多层应用程序。前端层和后端层均在 Amazon EC2 上运行，数据库在 Amazon RDS for MySQL 上运行。后端层与 RDS 实例通信。频繁调用从数据库返回相同的数据集会导致性能下降。应该采取哪些措施来提高后端的性能？
question_text.en: An ecommerce company is running a multi-tier application on AWS. The front-end and backend tiers both run on Amazon EC2, and the database runs on Amazon RDS for MySQL. The backend tier communicates with the RDS instance. There are frequent calls to return identical datasets from the database that are causing performance slowdowns. Which action should be taken to improve the performance of the backend?

A.zh: 实施 Amazon SNS 来存储数据库调用。
A.en: Implement Amazon SNS to store the database calls.

B.zh: 实施 Amazon ElastiCache 来缓存大型数据集。
B.en: Implement Amazon ElastiCache to cache the large datasets.

C.zh: 实施 RDS for MySQL 只读副本来缓存数据库调用。
C.en: Implement an RDS for MySQL read replica to cache database calls.

D.zh: 实施 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 以将调用流式传输到数据库。
D.en: Implement Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to stream the calls to the database.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案无法同时满足问题中的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或运维约束，因此不是最佳选择。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution cannot simultaneously meet the key performance, availability, security, cost or operation and maintenance constraints in the question, so it is not the best choice.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：完全满足题目要求，能够有效解决性能问题。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: It fully meets the requirements of the topic and can effectively solve performance problems.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：无法有效解决重复查询带来的性能问题。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: It cannot effectively solve the performance problems caused by repeated queries.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案无法同时满足问题中的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或运维约束，因此不是最佳选择。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution cannot simultaneously meet the key performance, availability, security, cost or operation and maintenance constraints in the question, so it is not the best choice.

answer_text.zh: B. 实施 Amazon ElastiCache 来缓存大型数据集。
answer_text.en: B. Implement Amazon ElastiCache to cache the large datasets.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：完全满足题目要求，能够有效解决性能问题。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: It fully meets the requirements of the topic and can effectively solve performance problems.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一名新员工加入一家公司，担任部署工程师。部署工程师将使用 AWS CloudFormation 模板创建多个 AWS 资源。解决方案架构师希望部署工程师在遵循最小特权原则的同时执行工作活动。解决方案架构师应该采取哪些行动组合来实现这一目标？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A new employee has joined a company as a deployment engineer. The deployment engineer will be using AWS CloudFormation templates to create multiple AWS resources. A solutions architect wants the deployment engineer to perform job activities while following the principle of least privilege. Which combination of actions should the solutions architect take to accomplish this goal? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 让部署工程师使用 AWS 账户根用户凭证来执行 AWS CloudFormation 堆栈操作。
A.en: Have the deployment engineer use AWS account root user credentials for performing AWS CloudFormation stack operations.

B.zh: 为部署工程师创建一个新的 IAM 用户，并将该 IAM 用户添加到附加了 PowerUsers IAM 策略的组中。
B.en: Create a new IAM user for the deployment engineer and add the IAM user to a group that has the PowerUsers IAM policy attached.

C.zh: 为部署工程师创建一个新的 IAM 用户，并将该 IAM 用户添加到附加了 AdministratorAccess IAM 策略的组。
C.en: Create a new IAM user for the deployment engineer and add the IAM user to a group that has the AdministratorAccess IAM policy attached.

D.zh: 为部署工程师创建一个新的 IAM 用户，并将该 IAM 用户添加到具有仅允许 AWS CloudFormation 操作的 IAM 策略的组。
D.en: Create a new IAM user for the deployment engineer and add the IAM user to a group that has an IAM policy that allows AWS CloudFormation actions only.

E.zh: 为部署工程师创建 IAM 角色，以显式定义特定于 AWS CloudFormation 堆栈的权限，并使用该 IAM 角色启动堆栈。
E.en: Create an IAM role for the deployment engineer to explicitly define the permissions specific to the AWS CloudFormation stack and launch stacks using that IAM role.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：root用户权限过高，违反了“最小权限原则”。 root 用户仅应用于账户管理或紧急情况，不应用于日常操作。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The root user has too high permissions and violates the "principle of least privileges". The root user should be used only for account management or emergencies and should not be used for daily operations.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：PowerUsers 策略允许用户管理资源，但不允许管理 IAM 权限。这可能会授予太多权限，但仍然违反“最小权限原则”。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The PowerUsers policy allows users to manage resources but not IAM permissions. This may grant too many permissions and still violate the "principle of least privilege."

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AdministratorAccess策略授予完全权限，远远超出了CloudFormation操作所需的权限，违反了“最小权限原则”。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The AdministratorAccess policy grants full permissions, which far exceeds the permissions required for CloudFormation operations, violating the "principle of least privilege".

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：该选项符合“最小权限原则”，仅授予CloudFormation相关操作权限，限制了用户权限范围。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option complies with the "principle of least privilege" and only grants CloudFormation-related operation permissions, limiting the scope of user permissions.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因：通过IAM角色可以清晰定义权限，需要时可以临时使用角色，进一步增强安全性和权限控制。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: Permissions can be clearly defined using IAM roles, and roles can be used temporarily when needed to further enhance security and permission control.

answer_text.zh: D. 为部署工程师创建一个新的 IAM 用户，并将该 IAM 用户添加到具有仅允许 AWS CloudFormation 操作的 IAM 策略的组。；E. 为部署工程师创建 IAM 角色，以显式定义特定于 AWS CloudFormation 堆栈的权限，并使用该 IAM 角色启动堆栈。
answer_text.en: D. Create a new IAM user for the deployment engineer and add the IAM user to a group that has an IAM policy that allows AWS CloudFormation actions only.; E. Create an IAM role for the deployment engineer to explicitly define the permissions specific to the AWS CloudFormation stack and launch stacks using that IAM role.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：DE (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：该选项符合“最小权限原则”，仅授予CloudFormation相关操作权限，限制了用户权限范围。；通过IAM角色可以清晰定义权限，需要时可以临时使用角色，进一步增强安全性和权限控制。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: DE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option complies with the "principle of least privilege" and only grants CloudFormation-related operation permissions, limiting the scope of user permissions.; Permissions can be clearly defined using IAM roles, and roles can be used temporarily when needed to further enhance security and permission control.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 VPC 中部署两层 Web 应用程序。 Web 层使用具有跨多个可用区的公有子网的 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 组。数据库层由位于不同私有子网中的 Amazon RDS for MySQL 数据库实例组成。 Web 层需要访问数据库来检索产品信息。 Web 应用程序未按预期运行。 Web 应用程序报告无法连接到数据库。数据库已确认已启动并正在运行。网络 ACL、安全组和路由表的所有配置仍处于默认状态。解决方案架构师应该建议什么来修复应用程序？
question_text.en: A company is deploying a two-tier web application in a VPC. The web tier is using an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group with public subnets that span multiple Availability Zones. The database tier consists of an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance in separate private subnets. The web tier requires access to the database to retrieve product information. The web application is not working as intended. The web application reports that it cannot connect to the database. The database is confirmed to be up and running. All configurations for the network ACLs, security groups, and route tables are still in their default states. What should a solutions architect recommend to fix the application?

A.zh: 向私有子网的网络 ACL 添加显式规则，以允许来自 Web 层 EC2 实例的流量。
A.en: Add an explicit rule to the private subnet’s network ACL to allow traffic from the web tier’s EC2 instances.

B.zh: 在 VPC 路由表中添加路由以允许 Web 层的 EC2 实例和数据库层之间的流量。
B.en: Add a route in the VPC route table to allow traffic between the web tier’s EC2 instances and the database tier.

C.zh: 将 Web 层的 EC2 实例和数据库层的 RDS 实例部署到两个单独的 VPC 中，并配置 VPC 对等互连。
C.en: Deploy the web tier's EC2 instances and the database tier’s RDS instance into two separate VPCs, and configure VPC peering.

D.zh: 向数据库层 RDS 实例的安全组添加入站规则，以允许来自 Web 层安全组的流量。
D.en: Add an inbound rule to the security group of the database tier’s RDS instance to allow traffic from the web tiers security group.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：网络 ACL 是无状态的，默认情况下允许所有流量进出。问题明确指出网络ACL仍处于默认状态，因此无需添加显式规则。这个选项是错误的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Network ACLs are stateless and allow all traffic in and out by default. The question clearly states that the network ACL is still in the default state, so there is no need to add explicit rules. This option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：VPC 路由表用于定义子网之间的流量路由。问题没有提到路由表配置问题，同一个VPC内的子网已经默认可以互通了。这个选项是错误的。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: VPC routing tables are used to define traffic routes between subnets. The question does not mention routing table configuration issues, and subnets in the same VPC can already communicate with each other by default. This option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：问题明确指出Web层和数据库层在同一个VPC中，因此不需要使用VPC Peering。这个选项是错误的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The question clearly states that the web layer and database layer are in the same VPC, so there is no need to use VPC Peering. This option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：安全组是有状态的，默认情况下仅允许来自自身的流量。 Web层的EC2实例需要访问数据库层的RDS实例，因此需要在RDS实例的安全组中添加入站规则，以允许来自Web层安全组的流量。这个选项是正确的。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Security groups are stateful and by default only allow traffic from themselves. The EC2 instance in the web layer needs to access the RDS instance in the database layer, so you need to add inbound rules to the security group of the RDS instance to allow traffic from the web layer security group. This option is correct.

answer_text.zh: D. 向数据库层 RDS 实例的安全组添加入站规则，以允许来自 Web 层安全组的流量。
answer_text.en: D. Add an inbound rule to the security group of the database tier’s RDS instance to allow traffic from the web tiers security group.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (97%) 3%。热门讨论与考点摘要：安全组是有状态的，默认情况下仅允许来自自身的流量。 Web层的EC2实例需要访问数据库层的RDS实例，因此需要在RDS实例的安全组中添加入站规则，以允许来自Web层安全组的流量。这个选项是正确的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (97%) 3%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Security groups are stateful and by default only allow traffic from themselves. The EC2 instance in the web layer needs to access the RDS instance in the database layer, so you need to add inbound rules to the security group of the RDS instance to allow traffic from the web layer security group. This option is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司将其在线广告业务的大型数据集存储在单个可用区的 Amazon RDS for MySQL 数据库实例中。该公司希望运行业务报告查询而不影响对生产数据库实例的写入操作。哪种解决方案满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has a large dataset for its online advertising business stored in an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance in a single Availability Zone. The company wants business reporting queries to run without impacting the write operations to the production DB instance. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 部署 RDS 只读副本来处理业务报告查询。
A.en: Deploy RDS read replicas to process the business reporting queries.

B.zh: 通过将数据库实例放置在弹性负载均衡器后面来水平扩展数据库实例。
B.en: Scale out the DB instance horizontally by placing it behind an Elastic Load Balancer.

C.zh: 将数据库实例扩展到更大的实例类型以处理写入操作和查询。
C.en: Scale up the DB instance to a larger instance type to handle write operations and queries.

D.zh: 在多个可用区中部署数据库实例以处理业务报告查询。
D.en: Deploy the DB instance in multiple Availability Zones to process the business reporting queries.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：RDS只读副本允许将读取操作分离到副本，从而减少主数据库的负载。这是解决读写分离问题的推荐方式。满足题目要求：读取副本不会影响主库的写操作。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: RDS read replicas allow read operations to be separated to replicas, thereby reducing the load on the primary database. This is the recommended way to solve the read-write separation problem. Meets the question requirements: Reading the replica will not affect the write operations of the primary database.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：RDS 实例不能直接放置在弹性负载均衡器后面。 ELB主要用于将流量分发到多个EC2实例，而不是数据库实例。不满足题目要求：该选项与数据库读写分离无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: RDS instances cannot be placed directly behind an Elastic Load Balancer. ELB is mainly used to distribute traffic to multiple EC2 instances, not database instances. Does not meet the question requirements: This option has nothing to do with database read and write separation.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然扩展到更大的实例类型可以提高性能，但并不能解决读写分离的问题。业务报告查询仍然会影响写入操作。不符合题目要求：题目明确要求避免影响写入操作。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While scaling to larger instance types can improve performance, it does not solve the problem of read-write separation. Business reporting queries will still affect write operations. Does not meet the requirements of the question: The question clearly requires that it avoid affecting the writing operation.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：多个可用区主要是为了提高数据库的高可用性，而不是为了优化读写分离。不满足问题要求：该选项无法解决读操作对写操作的影响。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Multiple availability zones are mainly used to improve the high availability of the database and not to optimize read and write separation. Does not meet the requirements of the question: This option cannot solve the impact of read operations on write operations.

answer_text.zh: A. 部署 RDS 只读副本来处理业务报告查询。
answer_text.en: A. Deploy RDS read replicas to process the business reporting queries.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：RDS只读副本允许将读取操作分离到副本，从而减少主数据库的负载。这是解决读写分离问题的推荐方式。满足题目要求：读取副本不会影响主库的写操作。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: RDS read replicas allow read operations to be separated to replicas, thereby reducing the load on the primary database. This is the recommended way to solve the read-write separation problem. Meets the question requirements: Reading the replica will not affect the write operations of the primary database.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在一组 Amazon EC2 实例上托管一个三层电子商务应用程序。这些实例在应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面的 Auto Scaling 组中运行。所有电子商务数据都存储在 Amazon RDS for MariaDB 多可用区数据库实例中。该公司希望优化交易期间的客户会话管理。应用程序必须持久存储会话数据。哪些解决方案可以满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company hosts a three-tier ecommerce application on a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. The instances run in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). All ecommerce data is stored in an Amazon RDS for MariaDB Multi-AZ DB instance. The company wants to optimize customer session management during transactions. The application must store session data durably. Which solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 打开 ALB 上的粘性会话功能（会话亲和性）。
A.en: Turn on the sticky sessions feature (session affinity) on the ALB.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon DynamoDB 表存储客户会话信息。
B.en: Use an Amazon DynamoDB table to store customer session information.

C.zh: 部署 Amazon Cognito 用户池来管理用户会话信息。
C.en: Deploy an Amazon Cognito user pool to manage user session information.

D.zh: 部署 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 集群来存储客户会话信息。
D.en: Deploy an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster to store customer session information.

E.zh: 在应用程序中使用 AWS Systems Manager Application Manager 来管理用户会话信息。
E.en: Use AWS Systems Manager Application Manager in the application to manage user session information.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析：启用ALB的会话功能可以将用户的请求定向到特定的EC2实例，从而实现会话管理。但这种方法不持久，无法满足“会话数据持久化存储”的要求。结论：该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Enabling the session function of ALB can target the user's request to a specific EC2 instance, thereby achieving session management. However, this method is not durable and cannot meet the requirement of "persistent storage of session data". Conclusion: This option does not meet the requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：DynamoDB 是一种持久存储解决方案，可以存储会话数据并提供高可用性和低延迟。然而，它并不是专门为会话管理而设计的，可能需要额外的开发工作来实现会话管理功能。结论：该选项不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: DynamoDB is a durable storage solution that can store session data and provide high availability and low latency. However, it is not specifically designed for session management and may require additional development work to implement session management functionality. Conclusion: This option does not meet the requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：Amazon Cognito 主要用于用户身份验证和授权，而不是会话数据的持久存储。它不适合接收用于管理账户的交易会话数据。结论：该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Amazon Cognito is mainly used for user authentication and authorization, not persistent storage of session data. It is not suitable for receiving transaction session data used to manage accounts. Conclusion: This option does not meet the requirements.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析：ElastiCache for Redis 是一种高性能内存存储解决方案，非常适合存储会话数据。它支持持久化，可以快速访问数据，满足会话管理的需求。结论：该选项符合题目要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: ElastiCache for Redis is a high-performance in-memory storage solution that is ideal for storing session data. It supports persistence and can quickly access data to meet the needs of session management. Conclusion: This option meets the requirements.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：AWS Systems Manager应用程序管理器主要用于管理应用程序生命周期，而不是会话数据的存储和管理。结论：该选项不符合题目要求。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: AWS Systems Manager Application Manager is mainly used to manage the application life cycle, not the storage and management of session data. Conclusion: This option does not meet the requirements.

answer_text.zh: A. 打开 ALB 上的粘性会话功能（会话亲和性）。；D. 部署 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 集群来存储客户会话信息。
answer_text.en: A. Turn on the sticky sessions feature (session affinity) on the ALB.; D. Deploy an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster to store customer session information.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：AD (37%) BD (34%) AB (27%) 2%。热门讨论与考点摘要：技术分析：启用ALB的会话功能可以将用户的请求定向到特定的EC2实例，从而实现会话管理。但这种方法不持久，无法满足“会话数据持久化存储”的要求。结论：该选项不符合题目要求。；技术分析：ElastiCache for Redis 是一种高性能内存存储解决方案，非常适合存储会话数据。它支持持久化，可以快速访问数据，满足会话管理的需求。结论：该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (37%) BD (34%) AB (27%) 2%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Technical analysis: Enabling the session function of ALB can target the user's request to a specific EC2 instance, thereby achieving session management. However, this method is not durable and cannot meet the requirement of "persistent storage of session data". Conclusion: This option does not meet the requirements.; Technical analysis: ElastiCache for Redis is a high-performance in-memory storage solution that is ideal for storing session data. It supports persistence and can quickly access data to meet the needs of session management. Conclusion: This option meets the requirements.
